title: Animal Garden - Red River Hog
description: This mod adds the Red River Hogs as tamable animals into the savanna biomes.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LnGMw7NO/images/40d9288f635cff331e92209d4a70bd168adc44fc.gif)

This mod adds the Red River Hogs as tamable animals into the savanna biomes.

 

They are **omnivorous**, so they can eat, be tamed or breed by any food item.

and are primarily **nocturnal** and somewhat **crepuscular**, meaning that they are active at night, dawn and dusk, and rest or sleep at daytime.

Sometimes they will eat grass and use their strong snouts to overturn soil, searching for seeds, and has 10% chance that **they leave an item behind**.

Also rarely (around 10-20 minutes) they will **sneeze a slime ball out**.

And **babies** will always **have a different texture variant**.

 

They **can be aggressive** and attack nearby creatures.

Just like in my other animal mods the mobs have 3 type of behavior that can be changed when interaction with them (a message shows up so you know which behavior it is using)

**(wandering - resting - following)**

So you can make them stay at a place when put in resting mode.

 

As mentioned they **spawn in the savanna biomes**.

You can **change** this and other **spawn settings**
by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders
or via resource pack,

but in fabric some spawn settings like the weight, min, max have to be edited in the config file

 

This mod currently supports:

**Forge        26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1 | 1.18.2**

**Neoforge    26.1.x | 1.21.x**

**Fabric      26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**


SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
